name: Spiced Zucchini and Peas in Tomato Sauce (Tor
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions, garlic, and celery. Cook for 2 minutes.
2. Stir in turmeric, cumin, and zucchini. Cook for an additional 5 minutes.
3. Pour in tomato sauce, peas, and cayenne pepper. Simmer until zucchini is tender, approximately 15 minutes.
4. Serve with a side of pasta or crusty bread.
Per serving: 109 cal, 4 g prot, 51 mg sod, 15 g carb, 5 g fat, 0 mg chol, 67 mg calcium
HINT: Use chopped fresh or canned tomatoes instead of tomato sauce.
Source: Vegetarian Gourmet, Autumn 1993
